chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Crl.Misc.A.No.S-225 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 01. For orders on M.A.No.4242/2024 (U/A). 02. For orders on office objection. 03. For orders on M.A.No.4058/2024 (E/A). 04. For the hearing of the main case. 29.07.2024. Mr. Saeed Ahmed Bijarani, Advocate for the applicants. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency granted. 2. Over-ruled. 3. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 4. It is contended by learned counsel for the applicants that based on very fair investigation, the applicants were let off by the police by placing their names in column No.2 of the charge sheet; they have been joined in trial by learned trial Magistrate without lawful justification, which order is impugned by them before this Court by way of instant Cr.Misc.Application and he would not press the same provided the applicants are permitted to seek their premature acquittal by filing such application before learned trial Court, per law. Under the discussed circumstances, the instant Cr.Misc.Application is dismissed as not pressed with direction to the learned trial Court to dispose of the application, if it is preferred by the applicants for their premature acquittal, within one month of its filing. Order accordingly. JUDGE
